title: Orange Town and the Thief Called Nami
main_description: The story shifts to Orange Town, where Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s pirates, and Luffy’s blunt honesty collide. The chapter begins the uneasy triangle between Luffy, Zoro, and Nami against Buggy’s occupation.
key_events: Nami becomes involved with Buggy’s crew.
Luffy and Zoro enter the Orange Town conflict.
Buggy’s threat over the town is introduced.
Nami’s motives remain suspicious but important.
review_reasons: Some dialogue-heavy parts still contain many unresolved speakers.
